title: Poznań, Greater Poland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Poznań, Greater Poland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Poznań is a city in Greater Poland with a population of 546,829. A major commercial and industrial hub in western Poland, famous for its Renaissance Old Town, Poznań International Fair, and goat-buttling clock tower.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
